query:
-- Create a test invoice for user 1 with amount field
INSERT INTO invoices (
  userId, 
  projectId, 
  invoiceNumber, 
  amount,
  totalAmount, 
  paidAmount,
  description, 
  budgetLineCategory, 
  status, 
  submittedAt,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1,
  1,
  'TEST-001',
  150.00,
  150.00,
  0.00,
  'Test Invoice for Detail Page - 2 sessions completed',
  'facilitator_fee',
  'pending',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify the invoice was created
SELECT id, invoiceNumber, amount, totalAmount, status, description 
FROM invoices 
WHERE invoiceNumber = 'TEST-001';
